message:
fix(web): initialize sequence state on renderer recreation

Critical bug fix: When the CanvasSequenceGridRenderer was recreated due
to visual pipeline changes (toggling scanlines, glow, postProcess, etc),
the sequence was never re-initialized on the new renderer because the
sequence-setting effect's dependencies hadn't changed.

Root cause:
- Renderer creation effect depends on: scanlines, glow, postProcess, etc
- Sequence effect depends on: displaySequence, viewMode, readingFrame
- When renderer recreated but sequence unchanged, setSequence never called
- New renderer has currentState=null, render() exits early → black canvas

Fix: Call setSequence() and setDiffMode() immediately after creating
the renderer to ensure it's always initialized with current state.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
